The problem

Most businesses don't have one problem.
They have six, tangled together.

Your website looks outdated. Your team doesn't use AI. Your product is missing the mark. And every consultant you've met only sees one piece of it. I see all six — because I've worked across all six disciplines simultaneously.

Your website isn't working
It doesn't rank on Google, doesn't convert visitors, and doesn't reflect the quality of what you actually do.
AI feels overwhelming
You know AI could help your business but don't know where to start, what to trust, or what's worth your time.
You're shipping the wrong things
Your product roadmap is a wish list. Features get built, nothing moves the needle, and the real problem never gets solved.
Enterprise prices are out of reach
Big consultancies quote $50K minimums. Freelancers disappear. Nobody sees the full picture at a price that makes sense.

What I do

Three ways to move
your business forward.

Service 01
AI-Powered Website Development
A fast, SEO-optimised, beautifully designed website built with AI — and the product thinking to make it actually convert. Not just a pretty page. A business tool that works while you sleep.
SEO-optimised Mobile-first UX-led Fast delivery
From $4,000 — delivered in days, not months
Get started →
Service 02
AI Adoption Programme
A structured 12-week engagement covering discovery, gap analysis, tool selection, and hands-on team training. Walk away with AI actually embedded in your business — not just a strategy doc.
AI Readiness Audit Gap Analysis Tool Selection Team Training
Variable — scoped to your team and goals
Learn more →
Service 03
Product Consulting
Discovery. Research. Roadmap. Delivery. Pick the modules your business needs, or go end-to-end. Built for startups and founders tired of shipping features that don't move the needle.
Discovery Sprint User Research Roadmap Delivery Support
Modular pricing — pay for what you need
Explore modules →

How it works

Simple, clear,
no surprises.

01
Free 30-minute discovery call
We talk about your business, your bottleneck, and what moving forward looks like. No pitch, no pressure — just honest thinking.
02
I find the overlap
Most problems have a root cause hiding in the intersection of UX, product, data, and strategy. I map it clearly so we solve the real thing.
03
We build and ship
Website, AI rollout, or product roadmap — we move fast, stay lean, and measure what matters. No tech debt. No disappearing acts.
04
Your business grows
Not just delivered and forgotten. I stay until the needle moves and you have the confidence and systems to keep it moving on your own.

About Shreya Pawar

I walk into the overlap —
where nobody else
is looking.

I'm Shreya Pawar — an aggressively groomed generalist from India, now based in Melbourne. I've worked as a data analyst, product designer, UX researcher, content manager, data engineer, and product manager. Sometimes all in the same week.

I started Third Spaces because brilliant Melbourne businesses were being left behind by technology. Not because they weren't smart enough — because nobody was building for them.

Data Analysis Product Design UX Research UX Design Content Strategy SQL · Data Engineering Product Management
